sourcesContent:
export const RESUME = {
  name: "Suyash Pal",
  title: "Data Analyst | Business Analyst | AI Engineer",
  email: "pal1805suyash@gmail.com",
  phone: "9555275305",
  location: "Noida, India",
  linkedin: "https://linkedin.com/in/suyashpal",
  github: "https://github.com/suyashpal",
  hackerrank: "https://hackerrank.com/suyashpal",
  portfolio: "#",

  profile: `Data Analyst | Business Analyst | AI Automation Engineer with experience in SQL, Python,
Power BI, ETL, Data Warehousing, Process Automation, Prompt Engineering, and Full-Stack AI Product Development.
Delivered measurable impact through analytics and automation, including ₹1.8 Cr/month cost savings,
70% faster reporting, and enterprise-scale workflow optimization. Skilled in transforming business problems
into scalable data and AI solutions.`,

  education: [
    {
      degree: "Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech)",
      field: "Computer and Communication Engineering",
      institution: "MIT Manipal",
      period: "2021 – 2025",
      location: "Manipal",
    }
  ],

  experience: [
    {
      title: "Data Analyst | Business Analyst | Automation Engineer",
      company: "Physics Wallah",
      period: "Jun 2025 – Present",
      location: "Noida",
      current: true,
      color: "#FF4D4D",
      icon: "🚀",
      metrics: [
        { val: "₹1.8 Cr", label: "Saved / Month" },
        { val: "70%",    label: "Faster Reporting" },
        { val: "80%",    label: "Less Manual Effort" },
        { val: "15K+",   label: "Orders Automated" },
      ],
      bullets: [
        "Built SQL ETL pipelines and validation workflows for SAP migration, ensuring accurate reconciliation and zero-loss financial data transfer.",
        "Developed Alteryx revenue automation pipeline, reducing reporting TAT by 70% and accelerating P&L cycles by 30%.",
        "Designed centralized Amazon Redshift + Trino data models/views for multi-entity reporting and executive dashboards.",
        "Automated financial reconciliation using Python + SQL, cutting manual audit effort by 80% and improving anomaly detection.",
        "Led travel cost optimization using data analysis, reducing no-show rate from 38% to 15% and saving ₹1.8 Cr/month.",
        "Automated SAP order updates for 15,000+ orders / 75,000+ line items using UiPath RPA, reducing a 1-week process to hours.",
      ],
    },
    {
      title: "Technical Intern",
      company: "TWIF Technologies Pvt Ltd",
      period: "Feb 2025 – Jun 2025",
      location: "Bangalore",
      current: false,
      color: "#4D79FF",
      icon: "⚡",
      metrics: [
        { val: "100+",  label: "Users Served" },
        { val: "40%",   label: "Less Post-Meeting Effort" },
      ],
      bullets: [
        "Built dashboards and backend analytics systems for a real-time platform serving 100+ users.",
        "Implemented AI meeting summarization workflows, reducing post-meeting effort by 40%.",
        "Developed backend APIs and reporting systems using Node.js, MongoDB, WebRTC.",
      ],
    },
    {
      title: "Full Stack Web Development Intern",
      company: "EazyByts Infotech",
      period: "Jun 2024",
      location: "Delhi, India",
      current: false,
      color: "#00C9A7",
      icon: "💻",
      metrics: [],
      bullets: [
        "Built a dynamic portfolio website generator using structured templates and automated UI generation.",
      ],
    },
  ],

  skills: [
    { category: "Languages & Analytics", color: "#FF4D4D", icon: "🔥", items: ["Python", "SQL", "Pandas", "NumPy", "Excel"] },
    { category: "BI & Visualization",    color: "#FFB800", icon: "📊", items: ["Power BI", "Tableau", "DAX", "Dashboarding"] },
    { category: "Databases & Warehousing", color: "#00C9A7", icon: "🗄️", items: ["PostgreSQL", "MySQL", "MongoDB", "Amazon Redshift", "Trino", "Supabase"] },
    { category: "Automation & ETL",      color: "#4D79FF", icon: "⚙️", items: ["Alteryx", "UiPath", "ETL Pipelines", "Data Cleaning", "Workflow Automation"] },
    { category: "Development",           color: "#C84BFF", icon: "💻", items: ["React", "Flutter", "Node.js", "Git", "REST APIs"] },
    { category: "AI / LLM",              color: "#FF6B6B", icon: "🤖", items: ["Claude Code", "Supabase MCP", "Stitch AI", "Rocket AI", "Prompt Engineering", "LLM Workflows"] },
    { category: "Core Skills",           color: "#F9A825", icon: "🧠", items: ["Data Analysis", "Stakeholder Management", "Root Cause Analysis", "LLM-Oriented Development", "Business Intelligence", "KPI Reporting", "Process Automation", "Requirement Gathering"] },
  ],

  projects: [
    {
      title: "AI Full-Stack SaaS Platform",
      subtitle: "Prompt Engineering Powered",
      emoji: "🚀",
      color: "#FF4D4D",
      tools: ["React", "Supabase", "Prompt Engineering", "LLM Workflows"],
      bullets: [
        "Built a multi-tenant SaaS application using React + Supabase through advanced prompt engineering and AI-assisted development.",
        "Generated CRUD systems, secure RLS access controls, APIs, and production-ready workflows using LLMs.",
      ],
    },
    {
      title: "Zappy Stay",
      subtitle: "AI-Driven Hospitality SaaS Platform",
      emoji: "🏨",
      color: "#C84BFF",
      tools: ["RocketAI", "Claude Code", "Flutter", "Android Studio", "Supabase"],
      bullets: [
        "Built an AI-driven hotel operations platform using Flutter + Supabase for onboarding, bookings, billing, and guest management.",
        "Accelerated development by 60% using AI coding workflows, prompt engineering, and rapid product iteration.",
      ],
    },
  ],

  certificates: [
    { name: "Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst", org: "Microsoft", color: "#0078D4", icon: "📊" },
    { name: "Google IT Automation with Python", org: "Google", color: "#4285F4", icon: "🐍" },
    { name: "Business Analyst Certificate",    org: "CareerNinja", color: "#C84BFF", icon: "💼" },
    { name: "SQL (Intermediate)",              org: "HackerRank", color: "#00C9A7", icon: "🛢️" },
  ],
};
